results.title: If coding becomes automated, then why are we needed at all: Infosys chairman Nandan Nilekani answers
results.description: Nilekani's comments come on the back of new rollouts by AI-native firms including Anthropic and OpenAI almost on a bi-weekly basis

results.title: Shalersville residents rally against a proposed data center
results.description: Hundreds showed up to either protest or get more details about a proposed data center that is planned for a 257-acre plot of land just off the Ohio Turnpike in Shalersville Township.

results.title: Jennifer Siebel Newsom encourages sports for CA body, mind at Sacramento event
results.description: First Partner Jennifer Siebel Newsom speaks during an event celebrating the Move Your Body, Calm Your Mind campaign at Street Soccer USA in Sacramento on Friday, May 29, 2026. The initiative encourages Californians of all ages to increase their physical activity and improve their mental well-being.

results.title: Man shot in South Tyler incident has died, Amarillo police reports
results.description: Amarillo police said an individual, who was taken to the hospital after a reported shooting a few days ago, has died.

results.title: 'Everything's gone': Community reacts after house fire kills one, displaces Ogden family
results.description: An Ogden community is reeling after a house fire killed one and displaced four others early Friday morning.

results.title: British-Born Sikh Man's Conviction In Southampton Murder Triggers Calls For Kirp...
results.description: The verdict, delivered by a jury at Southampton Crown Court, also fuelled allegations of two-tier policing over officers' handling of the dying victim.

results.title: Two CRPF officials die of suspected cardiac arrest in camps in J-K’s Pulwama, Shopian
results.description: Srinagar, May 30: Two CRPF officers died due suspected cardiac arrest in their camps in Pulwama and Shopian districts of Jammu and Kashmir on Friday, officials said. Inspector Tejpal Singh, a resident of Haryana, was found unconscious at the the Central Reserve Police Force (CRPF) Regional Training Centre, Lethpora, in Pulwama around 5.00 pm. Officials [...]

results.title: One dead after Frayser shooting, suspect flees the scene
results.description: The Memphis Police Department is investigating after a man was killed in a shooting in Frayser on Friday night.

results.title: Trump's name must be removed from Kennedy Center, judge rules
results.description: "The Kennedy Center is an institution that belongs to the American people, not to Donald Trump," said Rep. Joyce Beatty, who sued over the renaming. Trump's name must be removed from Kennedy Center, judge rules

results.title: Blue Origin rocket explosion at Cape Canaveral threatens NASA moon plans and SpaceX rivalry
results.description: Blue Origin’s fiery launchpad disaster has raised fresh questions over NASA’s moon plans and America’s space future.

results.title: GCC-run schools to get 180 temporary physical education teachers for 2026-27
results.description: The appointments will be made for a period of 10 months, from June 2026 to March 2027.
